workflow_goal: Repair this Modelica model so that it passes OpenModelica checkModel and simulation while preserving the declared public model interface.
acceptance: The final model must be complete Modelica source code.
OpenModelica simulate(model_name) must reach an accepted simulation status with the specified stop_time, intervals, and warning policy.
Accepted warning-pass status requires a non-empty result file and successful simulation completion; fatal warnings remain failures.
The declared top-level model name and public interface should be preserved unless a change is required for validity.
